## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Type of change

- [ ] feat
- [ ] fix
- [ ] chore
- [ ] docs
- [ ] test
- [ ] ci

## Validation

- [ ] `npm run lint`
- [ ] `npm run type-check`
- [ ] `npm run test`
- [ ] `npm run build`

## Ownership boundaries

- [ ] I only modified files in my ownership area (or had explicit approval)

Add screenshots, logs, or test report snippets.
